results.title: Lena Dunham Pops in 2 Custom Colorful Two-Pieces for Taylor Swift's Wedding
results.description: Lena Dunham brought plenty of color to her best friend Taylor Swift’s highly celebrated wedding to Travis Kelce. Dunham, 40, opted for two custom looks when attending Swift’s Friday, July 3, nuptials to the Kansas City Chiefs tight end, starting with a cropped lime green blazer from Amber Doyle featuring a row of bows dotting [...]
